import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut maxv = 0
  mut minv = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
    if is_space
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut start = i
      if b == 45 or b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      while i < n
        mut c = 0
        match string.byte_at(text, i)
        when Some(x)
          c = x
        when None
          c = 0
        end
        let sp = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13 or c == 11 or c == 12
        if sp
          i = n + 1
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
      let stop = if i > n
        i - 1
      else
        i
      end
      let tok = string.substring(text, start, stop)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if not has
          maxv = v
          minv = v
          has = true
        else
          if v > maxv
            maxv = v
          end
          if v < minv
            minv = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  println("max=#{maxv}")
  println("min=#{minv}")
end
